hero.subtitle: The first CRM with Autonomous Intelligence for demanding enterprises. Let AI qualify your leads — focus on closing.

problem.title: Why demanding enterprises won't tolerate traditional service
problem.subtitle: Every minute of delay is a sale lost to a competitor. Every cold lead reaching a human SDR is wasted time.
problem.card1_desc: After 5 minutes, lead qualification odds drop 80%. Human teams can't respond at that speed.
problem.card2_desc: Two-thirds of your SDR's time is wasted on leads that will never close. That's burned revenue.
problem.card3_desc: What a typical enterprise loses to slow response and poor manual triage.

ecosystem.title: Three autonomous engines. One platform.
ecosystem.subtitle: SDR, Help Desk and Voice. Intelligence synchronized from first touch to close.
ecosystem.sdr_desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, LinkedIn and Web Widget. AI qualifies, categorizes and routes in seconds — before your competitor even sees the notification.
ecosystem.sdr_b3: Smart human handoff at the right moment
ecosystem.help_desc: AI resolves recurring tickets on its own and surgically triages complex cases. Your team focuses on what requires human expertise.
ecosystem.help_b2: Triage by urgency, sentiment and SLA
ecosystem.voice_desc: Telephony integrated into the CRM with SIP technology. Every call transcribed, analyzed and routed to the right agent at the right time.
ecosystem.voice_b3: Recordings stored in your Google Drive

funnel.title: The Smart Funnel in action
funnel.subtitle: Volume in. Intelligence filters. Value out. Three layers, one operational symphony.
funnel.step1_desc: Every channel pouring in leads in real time. The more the better — AI handles it.
funnel.step2_desc: Qualification algorithms separate gold from noise. Cold leads get nurtured, hot leads go straight to the team.
funnel.step3_desc: Only conversation-ready leads reach human SDRs. Total focus on closing.

advantages.title: Built for those who can't afford to fail
advantages.subtitle: Data sovereignty, bank-grade security and native integrations. Everything your IT team needs to approve.
advantages.drive_desc: Call recordings and WhatsApp histories are stored directly in your company's Google Drive. Total data sovereignty — never on our servers.
advantages.security_desc: End-to-end encryption, corporate SSO (SAML/OIDC) and full LGPD/GDPR compliance. SOC 2 Type II audit in progress.
advantages.ecosystem_desc: Native APIs for SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, HubSpot and the world's leading ERPs. Integration in days, not months.

cta.title: Ready to scale your excellence?
cta.subtitle: Stop losing sales to slow service. See AI running your funnel in a 30-minute demo.

footer.tagline: Autonomous intelligence for sales with excellence.

modal.title: Book a Demo
modal.subtitle: See Lead Seller operating in 30 minutes. Business hours · Brasília (BRT).
modal.success_desc: Our team will confirm by email shortly.
modal.error_desc: We saved your details locally — we'll be in touch.

cookies.title: Your privacy comes first
cookies.description: We use essential cookies to operate the site and analytics cookies to improve your experience. You can accept all or keep only essentials. Read more in our
